en: I know. What? Well, how about when we were first going out,
and I'm very self-conscious because I'm very hairy,

en: and don't, I shaved my arm, so I actually am not, well, yeah, no, but I'm very,

ko: 그래서 항상 그게 신경 쓰였어. 고마워.

en: and I remember that you said that you liked it because you felt that it meant
ko: 네가 그걸 좋아한다고 말했던 게 기억나,

en: that I had more, you said that it meant that I had more testosterone, and that's why I like sex.
And. I'm a romantic, that's the point of it.
I was thinking about it, because I hadn't thought about it, and I thought about it today,
ko: 오늘 생각해봤는데, 그걸 생각해본 적이 없었어. 오늘 생각해봤어.

en: and you know what you would love? What? Really?
ko: 그리고 네가 좋아할 만한 게 뭐냐면? 뭐?

en: What do you mean by that? I would love men.
ko: 그게 무슨 뜻이야? 나는 남자들을 좋아해.

en: Now I'm thinking of the, I'm sorry.
ko: 지금 그 놀라움이 생각나서, 미안해. 뭐?

en: I'm thinking of the surprise, and I just had so much fun, actually,
